command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Send fresh test, then watch journal in real time ==="
# Clear journal cursor by noting current time
BEFORE=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')

curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/sendMessage" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chat_id":"-1003934415467","text":"Sakura test 2 - what model are you on?"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('sent:', d.get('ok'))"

echo "Waiting 30s for processing..."
sleep 30

echo "=== Journal since test sent ==="
sudo journalctl -u hermes-gateway --since "$BEFORE" --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -40

echo ""
echo "=== Did Sakura send any message back? Check recent group messages ==="
# getUpdates won't work with webhook set, so check bot's last sent via a different signal
echo "(check Telegram group directly for Sakura's reply)"

echo "=== Confirm still active, no crash ==="
systemctl is-active hermes-gateway
sudo journalctl -u hermes-gateway -n 3 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -3
REMOTE
